notes: v0.16.72 — OVERLOAD GRID balance fix. Heat on generators is now PERMANENT (no decay) so every hit you land sticks — the 0/X overload target is actually achievable. Trade-off: hot generators fire MUCH faster to keep the encounter tense. Fire interval scales 1.2 s @ 10% heat → 0.20 s @ 100% heat (was 1.5 → 0.6 s). Firing threshold dropped from 30% to 10% heat. On HARD/BRUTAL, generators above 80% heat now fire a 3-shot fan instead of a single bullet — the final push is genuinely scary. Windows only.
